This is a testharness.js-based test.

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "Error: get_accessibility_properties_for_element is a testdriver.js function which cannot be run in this context."
[FAIL] tablist subtree
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "Error: get_accessibility_properties_for_element is a testdriver.js function which cannot be run in this context."
Harness: the test ran to completion.
